reviews.review_description: As a solo developer of this game… I will obviously have to give this a solid 5 stars. I can confidently say, there’s no other game native on quest 2 or quest 3 that has the same engineered blur mechanics to make the game feel cinematic. Hope you all enjoy.

The game is amazing, the owner is also awesome for helping me get the game!!! I'm just going to say it before it happens, ignore bald men that call you a mother f*****, they are lying, you are amazing if you get this game

reviews.review_title: Anyone who puts 1 star is a troll
reviews.review_description:
If you try the game you can see that there’s so much potential. Single player story, escape rooms, ministicks online and escape rooms online on the way. It’s impossible for this to get 1 star with how much it offers. 

Anyone who thinks that is genuinely a troll. 

There are a few bugs but it’s in early access… so I can only expect it to get better from here… glad to see something different than a gorilla tag fan game or a remake. Super original feeling and looking game, recommend for all horror fans.
If you like spooky, story-driven games, this is for you. The environment is very creative and unique. You won’t find another game like this. Survive and escape each level….thats all you gotta do!
Love the scariness in beginning game kicked me a couple times It is in early development so I hope I can come back and change rating does look like it’s spooky ⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body: hope you have a chance to check out the new updates - its been a lot of chipping away - the game has come into more full of an experience over all

reviews.review_description:
So this is an early impression review 
I went I’m not knowing what to expect, oh boy the atmosphere is terrifying, images faze in and out, I’m definitely not playing this at night, curtains open middle of the day.
I’m now locked in a bar looking for a key, do I want to find the key to go outside I’m not sure I will decide later when it gets light, I just need to take some man up pills.
